title: View financial dashboard summary and charts after login
description: Verifies an authenticated user can load the dashboard and see summary indicators and a 30-day trend chart rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard page to load
Verify financial summary indicators are displayed
Verify a 30-day trend chart is displayed

title: Dashboard reflects changes after creating an income transaction
description: Verifies creating an income transaction updates dashboard totals accordingly and the updated values render.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard page to load
Navigate to the transaction creation area from the dashboard
Select the transaction type as income
Fill 123.45 into the amount field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Submit the transaction form
Return to the dashboard summary view
Verify the dashboard balance or income total reflects the newly created transaction

title: Create a loan and record a paid installment linked to transactions
description: Verifies creating a loan, recording a paid installment, and then viewing the linked loan-related transaction works end-to-end.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the loans area
Start creating a new loan
Fill 1000 into the principal field
Fill 5 into the interest rate field
Fill 3 into the installments field
Fill a valid start date into the start date field
Fill Borrower Test into the borrower field
Submit the loan form
Open the newly created loan details view
Start recording a new installment payment
Select a valid installment number
Fill 100 into the installment amount field
Fill a valid date into the installment date field
Mark the installment as paid
Submit the installment form
Navigate to the transactions area
Filter transactions to show those linked to the loan
Verify at least one transaction linked to the loan installment is displayed

title: Create transaction and verify it appears in list and detail
description: Verifies a user can create a transaction and then find it in the transaction list and open its detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the transactions area
Start creating a new transaction
Select the transaction type as income
Fill 222.22 into the amount field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Fill Test transaction A into the description field
Submit the transaction form
Locate the newly created transaction in the list
Open the transaction details view for that transaction
Verify the transaction detail view is displayed for the selected transaction

title: Filter or search transactions by a term
description: Verifies the user can filter or search transaction history and the list updates to match the query.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the transactions area
Start creating a new transaction
Select the transaction type as expense
Fill 10.00 into the amount field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Fill UniqueSearchToken-987 into the description field
Submit the transaction form
Fill UniqueSearchToken-987 into the transaction search field
Verify the transaction list shows results matching the search query

title: Dashboard chart range can be changed
description: Verifies the user can change the dashboard chart range and the chart updates to show the selected range data.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard page to load
Select a different chart range option
Verify the chart updates to display data for the newly selected range

title: Transactions list shows most recent items first
description: Verifies the transactions list sorting presents the most recent transaction at the top when sorting is set to descending.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the transactions area
Start creating a new transaction
Select the transaction type as income
Fill 1.00 into the amount field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Fill SortCheck-Old into the description field
Submit the transaction form
Start creating a new transaction
Select the transaction type as income
Fill 2.00 into the amount field
Fill a valid date into the date field
Fill SortCheck-New into the description field
Submit the transaction form
Set the transaction sort order to descending if a sort control exists
Verify the most recently created transaction appears before older transactions in the list

title: Dashboard handles empty data state
description: Verifies the dashboard loads successfully and shows a clear empty state when there are no transactions or loans.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard page to load
Verify an empty or zeroed financial summary state is displayed
Verify the charts area renders without breaking and shows an empty state when applicable

title: Transaction creation requires amount and type
description: Verifies the transaction form prevents submission when required fields are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the transactions area
Start creating a new transaction
Fill a valid date into the date field
Submit the transaction form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the transaction is not created and the form remains in an editable state

title: Prevent recording an installment that overpays the remaining loan balance
description: Verifies the loan installment form blocks overpayment amounts and shows validation feedback without recording the installment.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to the loans area
Start creating a new loan
Fill 100 into the principal field
Fill 0 into the interest rate field
Fill 1 into the installments field
Fill a valid start date into the start date field
Fill Overpay Borrower into the borrower field
Submit the loan form
Open the newly created loan details view
Start recording a new installment payment
Select a valid installment number
Fill 1000 into the installment amount field
Fill a valid date into the installment date field
Mark the installment as paid
Submit the installment form
Verify an overpayment validation error is visible
Verify the installment is not recorded
